The '''''Barderia''''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rhanken]]. It was roughly 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and boxy. The captain worked a route of several [[Star system/Legends|systems]] in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], which included the [[Halmad system/Legends|Halmad system]].

==History==
In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], [[Wraith Squadron]], posing as the [[Hawk-bat Independent Space Force]], targeted the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] as part of their [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] activities. [[Garik Loran|"General Kargin"]] was able to get the ''Barderia''{{'s}} [[Barderia navigator|navigator]] drunk and learn the ship's course. The Wraiths were capable enough to board the ship and take their choice of cargo twice, once in an unknown system and again just outside [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]]. [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and "Kargin" damaged the ship's engines, communications antenna, and weapons systems from their stolen [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]], but sent a distress signal for the ship upon their departure.

{{Ship-stub}}
